languages.text:
Until the end of combat, oiled ground additionally apply a stacking -5% armour penalty to enemies that collect them.
Gain {g|f:a7841f4596694e508c302b5ffab92753}Slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Until the end of combat, oiled ground additionally apply a stacking -5% armour penalty to enemies that collect them.
Gain {g|f:a7841f4596694e508c302b5ffab92753}Slowed{/g} until the end of combat.

languages.text:
Until the end of combat, enemies that enter oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user becomes slowed until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:
Until the end of combat, the enemies that enter the oiled cells also suffer −5% penalty to armour. Stacks.
At the end of their turn, the user suffers {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}.

Until the end of combat, the enemies that enter the oiled cells also suffer −5% penalty to armour. Stacks.
At the end of their turn, the user suffers {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}.

Until the end of combat, enemies that enter oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user becomes slowed until the end of combat.

Until the end of combat, enemies that enter the oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user suffers a {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}crippled leg{/g}.

languages.text:
До конца боя противники, входящие в замасленные клетки, также получают {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штраф{/g} −5% к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броне{/g}. Эффект суммируется.
В конце {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} обладатель аугмента {g|f:6338756ef76148369f50bc5d6d48ac4a}калечит ногу{/g}.

До конца боя противники, входящие в замасленные клетки, также получают {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}штраф{/g} −5% к {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}броне{/g}. Эффект суммируется.

languages.text:
Hasta el final del combate, todo enemigo que entre en casillas cubiertas de aceite sufrirá también una {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalización{/g} de −5 % a su {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armadura{/g}. Este efecto es acumulativo.
Al final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario queda ralentizado hasta el final del combate.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of combat, enemies that enter oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user becomes slowed until the end of combat.

traits.locale_text:

Al final de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g}, el usuario queda ralentizado hasta el final del combate.

languages.text:
Bis zum Ende des Kampfes werden Gegner, die geölte Felder betreten, außerdem mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}Abzug{/g} von −5 % auf ihre {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Rüstung{/g} belegt. Stapelbar.
Am Ende seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} wird er bis zum Ende des Kampfes verlangsamt.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of combat, enemies that enter oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user becomes slowed until the end of combat.

Am Ende seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} wird er bis zum Ende des Kampfes verlangsamt.

languages.text:
Yağa bulanmış hücrelere giren düşmanlar, {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}zırh{/g} değerlerine −%5 {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ceza puanı{/g} alır. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer. Etki üst üste birikebilir.
Kullanıcı, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} sonlandığında {g|Encyclopedia:SlowedEffect}yavaşlar{/g}. Bu etki, çatışma sonuna dek sürer.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of combat, enemies that enter oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user becomes slowed until the end of combat.

languages.text:
Jusqu'à la fin du combat, les ennemis au contact des cellules huileuses subissent également une {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}pénalité{/g} de −5 % à l'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}Armure{/g}. Cumulable.
À la fin de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g}, l'utilisateur subit un Ralentissement jusqu'à la fin du combat.
languages.original_text:
Until the end of combat, enemies that enter oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.
At the end of their {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, the user becomes slowed until the end of combat.

languages.text:
直到战斗结束，进入覆油格子的敌人还会承受5%的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}减值{/g}。此效果可叠加。
其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，使用者承受减速效果，直到战斗结束。
languages.original_text:
Until the end of combat, enemies that enter oiled cells also suffer a −5% {g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}penalty{/g} to {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}armour{/g}. Stacks.

traits.locale_text:
直到战斗结束，进入覆油格子的敌人还会承受5%的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}护甲{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}减值{/g}。此效果可叠加。
其{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}结束时，使用者承受减速效果，直到战斗结束。

languages.text:
戦闘終了まで、油のマスに入った敵は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}装甲{/g}に−5%の{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ペナルティ{/g}も受ける。スタックする。
{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時、使用者は戦闘終了まで鈍足になる。

traits.locale_text:
戦闘終了まで、油のマスに入った敵は{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerArmourGlossary}装甲{/g}に−5%の{g|Encyclopedia:Penalty}ペナルティ{/g}も受ける。スタックする。
{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターン{/g}終了時、使用者は戦闘終了まで鈍足になる。
